description:
The quiz assesses proficiency with Regular Expressions, covering basic patterns, quantifiers, grouping, and advanced look‑around assertions, presented in an engaging, supportive tone. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, encouraging learners to solidify fundamentals while tackling more complex regex challenges. The instructional voice motivates continued practice and frames mastery as an attainable goal.
Topics: Regular expression syntax, Quantifiers, Capture groups, Look‑around assertions, Pattern validation
Audience: Developers, QA engineers, and computer science students who have basic programming knowledge and want to deepen their regex skills.
